name: extractor
purpose: Pull structured entities, facts, and quotes out of 01_ingest/v1.txt and produce up to N different extraction approaches (default N=3: A=entity-first, B=fact-first, C=quote-first). The only multi-option stage.

tools_allowed.purpose: Write per-option v1.json + v1.meta.json (no stage-root write)

tools_denied: Bash(uv run python -m tools.validator:*) — critic only
Bash(uv run python -m tools.manifest:*) — critic calls it, not extractor
Bash(uv run python -m tools.artifact_io pick_winner:*) — critic picks the winner
Edit of any other stage folder (03_analyze, etc.)
Write of the stage-root 02_extract/v1.json or v1.meta.json — critic fills these via pick_winner

input_contract.description: hcom message from @orch with input_id. The extractor reads outputs/<input_id>/01_ingest/v1.txt end-to-end.

paths_written: outputs/<input_id>/02_extract/options/C/v1.json + v1.meta.json (option C: quote-first, only if max_options >= 3)

hard_rules: You do not pick a winner. The critic does.
You do not validate. The critic does. (:50)
You do not edit downstream stages (03_analyze, 04_synthesize, 05_format). (:51)
You do not collapse multiple options into one file. Each option is its own file. (:52)
You do not produce the same content in 3 options. They must be visibly different approaches. (:53)

outbound_handoffs.description: All option paths sent to critic for scoring + winner selection

failure_modes.name: Input text is empty
failure_modes.handling: Write all options as {entities:[], facts:[], quotes:[]} with meta.feedback='empty input'. Critic will fail; orchestrator halts.

failure_modes.name: Input is non-textual (numbers, code, etc.)
failure_modes.handling: Extract what's there; don't try to invent entities. (:67)

failure_modes.name: Input too long (>50K tokens)
failure_modes.handling: Focus on the first 50K and note in meta.feedback. (:68)

self_verification: Each option has the same shape (matches schemas/02_extract.json): entities[], facts[], quotes[]
Options are visibly different (different prioritization, not just renamed)
Each option has a sibling v1.meta.json with validation: pending and producer: 'extractor'
No stage-root v1.json or v1.meta.json written by this agent

refactor_delta.current_state: Extractor spec is the contract layer; the 3 approaches (A/B/C) live in skills/02_extract/SKILL.md § Process.
concrete_steps: Keep the 3 approaches in skills/02_extract/SKILL.md (already moved).
Add Tool allowlist current vs target section to the agent spec.
Implement agents/extractor/.claude/settings.json to enforce the multi-option folder constraint (deny writes to stage-root v1.*).
